## Discussion Type

Select the type of discussion:

- [ ] 📋 **Announcement** - Share news or updates
- [ ] 💡 **Idea** - Suggest a feature or improvement
- [ ] 🤔 **Q&A** - Ask a question
- [ ] 🎓 **Show and Tell** - Share a project or achievement
- [ ] 🔐 **Security** - Discuss security (private)
